ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
Language: julia
ClimaAtmos.jl is an atmosphere model that is designed to leverage data assimilation and machine learning tools for modeling and calibrating subgrid-scale processes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/Oceananigans.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl
Language: julia
🌊 Julia software for fast, friendly, flexible, ocean-flavored fluid dynamics on CPUs and GPUs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the Enzyme automatic differentiator

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ferrite-FEM/Ferrite.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ferrite-FEM/Ferrite.jl
Language: julia
Finite element toolbox for Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GenericMappingTools/GMT.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GenericMappingTools/GMT.jl
Language: julia
Generic Mapping Tools Library Wrapper for Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaDocs/Documenter.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaDocs/Documenter.jl
Language: julia
A documentation generator for Julia.

URL: https://github.com/JuliaLang/Pkg.jl
Language: julia
Pkg - Package manager for the Julia programming language

URL: https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia
Language: julia
The Julia Programming Language

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General
Language: julia
The official registry of general Julia packages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaSymbolics/Symbolics.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaSymbolics/Symbolics.jl
Language: julia
Symbolic programming for the next generation of numerical software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MakieOrg/Makie.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MakieOrg/Makie.jl
Language: julia
Interactive data visualizations and plotting in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Nemocas/AbstractAlgebra.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Nemocas/AbstractAlgebra.jl
Language: julia
Generic abstract algebra functionality in pure Julia (no C dependencies)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Nemocas/Nemo.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Nemocas/Nemo.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the FLINT number theory C library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/LinearSolve.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/LinearSolve.jl
Language: julia
LinearSolve.jl: High-Performance Unified Interface for Linear Solvers in Julia. Easily switch between factorization and Krylov methods, add preconditioners, and all in one interface.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
Language: julia
An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/NonlinearSolve.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/NonlinearSolve.jl
Language: julia
High-performance and differentiation-enabled nonlinear solvers (Newton methods), bracketed rootfinding (bisection, Falsi), with sparsity and Newton-Krylov support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/SciMLBase.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/SciMLBase.jl
Language: julia
The Base interface of the SciML ecosystem

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sienna-Platform/PowerSimulations.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sienna-Platform/PowerSimulations.jl
Language: julia
Julia for optimization simulation and modeling of PowerSystems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SpeedyWeather/SpeedyWeather.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SpeedyWeather/SpeedyWeather.jl
Language: julia
Play atmospheric modelling like it's LEGO.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atoptima/Coluna.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atoptima/Coluna.jl
Language: julia

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: julia

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: julia
Trixi.jl: Adaptive high-order numerical simulations of conservation laws in Julia
